provider_wording: Rent different types of business vehicles
short_description: Provides access to business vehicles through a lease or rental-style agreement rather than outright purchase.
why_included: The product is explicitly positioned as a way for businesses to rent different types of vehicles.
customer_value: Allows businesses to access vehicles without immediate outright purchase, supporting cash-flow management and fleet flexibility.

provider_wording: With a maintenance option or otherwise
short_description: Allows the lease/rental arrangement to include vehicle maintenance as an option.
why_included: The public product summary says business vehicles can be rented with a maintenance option or without one.
customer_value: Gives customers the choice to reduce maintenance administration and potentially improve cost predictability.

provider_wording: From single vehicles to entire fleets
short_description: Supports leasing/rental needs from an individual business vehicle through to multi-vehicle fleets.
why_included: The product summary explicitly states that the offer applies from single vehicles to entire fleets.
customer_value: Allows customers to start with limited vehicle needs and scale the arrangement as fleet requirements grow.

short_description: Provides financing or funding structures for fleet vehicles.
why_included: Fleet funding is listed in WesBank Fleet Solutions evidence captured during Phase 2.
customer_value: Helps businesses acquire or access vehicles while managing capital allocation and financing requirements.

why_included: Procurement is listed in the WesBank Fleet Solutions evidence captured during Phase 2.

short_description: Provides management support for the ongoing operation and administration of fleet vehicles.

short_description: Includes tyre replacement, tyre maintenance, tyre cover or tyre-health support.
why_included: Tyre cover is included in the monthly rental terms.
customer_value: Reduces unexpected tyre-related costs and operational disruptions.

short_description: Allows customers to use vehicles over an agreed rental, lease or long-term access period without outright purchase.
why_included: Kalahari explicitly offers rent-or-lease access for corporate use.
customer_value: Provides access to vehicles without the complexity or risk of outright ownership.

short_description: Structures the contract around a defined term, mileage allowance, usage profile or rental period.
why_included: The corporate page explicitly lists project-based and long-term rentals.
customer_value: Allows customers to align vehicle access with expected duration and utilisation.

short_description: Customises lease or rental terms, service options or fleet solutions to the customer requirement.
why_included: Kalahari positions the corporate product as tailor-made.
customer_value: Lets customers match vehicle access to operational needs instead of buying a generic product.

provider_wording: tracking device that logs and transmits Real-Time GPS Location, Speed and other Driving Indicators
short_description: Uses tracking, GPS, telematics or vehicle monitoring to provide location or driving data.
why_included: The corporate fleet includes GPS and driving-indicator tracking.
customer_value: Improves visibility over vehicles, location and driving behaviour.

provider_wording: Detailed driving and location logs on request
short_description: Provides reporting, logs, analytics or visibility over vehicle use or fleet performance.
why_included: Corporate customers can request driving and location logs.
customer_value: Improves transparency for monitoring usage, costs, safety or operational outcomes.

provider_wording: Regular service intervals at Toyota workshop
short_description: Coordinates or includes maintenance, servicing, repairs or related upkeep for vehicles.
why_included: Maintenance practices are described for the corporate fleet.
customer_value: Reduces downtime risk and the administrative burden of arranging service and repairs.

provider_wording: Digital booking platform with live availability checks & confirmation
short_description: Provides digital booking, online application, live availability or electronic entry into the product flow.
why_included: The corporate page lists digital booking and live availability.
customer_value: Reduces friction in starting or managing the vehicle access journey.

short_description: Provides a predictable recurring rental, monthly cost or quoted monthly mobility package.
why_included: The provider references special leasing rates for multi-month needs.
customer_value: Improves budgeting and reduces unexpected ownership-style cash-flow shocks.
